U 3/8/2006-it3tTf] •*Hfa < p m , «^<w Tpri^ra MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th February, 2012 G.S.R. 68(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 29A of the Company Secretaries Act, 1980 (56 of 1980). the Central Government, with effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette, hereby makes the following a m e n d m e n t s in the notification of the Government of India Ministry of Corporate Affairs, published in the Gazette of India vzWeG.S.R. 490(E) dated the 13th July, 2007, namely:— 2. In the said notification under the opening para- graph, against the item numbers (1), (2), (3), (4) and (5), for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substi- tuted, namely:— "(1) ShnU.C Nahta, —Chairperson DII, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi-110001. (2) Shri Anil Kumar Bhardwaj, —Member Director, Ministry of Corporate Affairs. New Delhi-110001. 371 Gl/2012 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTU—SEC. 3(i)] (3) ShriJohnK. Sellate, —Member Pr. Director of Commercial Audit and Ex-officio Member, Audit Board-IV, New Delhi. 8-9 Floor, CAG Buiiding (Annexe), 10, Bahadur Shah Zafar Marg, New Delhi-110002. (4) ShriHarishK.Vaid, —Member Senior President (Corporate Affairs) and Company Secretary, Jaiprakash Associates Limited, Sector 128, NOIDA - 201304 (5) Shri Sanjay Grover, —Member".
